code:
import JudgeProblem

def submission : Goal := by
  intro G _ h
  intro x y z
  calc
    x = ((y ◇ z) ◇ x) := h x (y ◇ z)
    _ = (x ◇ ((y ◇ z) ◇ x)) := h ((y ◇ z) ◇ x) x
    _ = (x ◇ (x ◇ ((y ◇ z) ◇ x))) := h (x ◇ ((y ◇ z) ◇ x)) x
